creator: petteri.valkonen@iki.fi
text:
Created attachment 254099
Patch to update net-mgmt/bandwhich to version 0.23.1

Changelog: https://github.com/imsnif/bandwhich/releases/tag/v0.23.1

The previous patch for the `time` crate (`files/patch-rust-1.80.0`) is now included in `time-0.3.36` and can thus be removed.
